name: list-criteria
description: Numbered criteria list — each requirement is a row with rationale.
purpose: Use to enumerate the criteria a decision must meet, in priority order. Numbering signals weight; each row reads as a complete requirement.

criteria.description: One li per criterion. Lead each with **Criterion name.** then the rationale.

skeleton:
<!-- _class: list-criteria -->

## What every decision must satisfy.

1. **First criterion.** Short rationale for why this matters.
2. **Second criterion.** Short rationale.
3. **Third criterion.** Short rationale.
4. **Fourth criterion.** Short rationale.
